description_long: This is a dark brown, wooden shelving unit with a distinctive trapezoidal shape, featuring two open shelves supported by vertical dividers. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing objects, while the open front and back allow for easy access to the shelves. The sides are angled, giving the unit a modern, geometric appearance, and the wood grain texture is visible throughout. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy, designed to hold books, electronics, or decorative items. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open storage function. The overall construction suggests it is a freestanding piece, likely used in living rooms, offices, or urban public spaces for display or storage.
description: A dark brown, open wooden shelving unit with two shelves and a broad, flat top, featuring angled sides and a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves, vertical dividers, and the full width of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled side panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back and the angled rear corners of the unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the angled side and shelf depth seen in view 1.
